languages.text: "Я займусь остальными поселениями, а вы направляйтесь в Клеть, Ваша Светлость. Там Янур и губернатор, они скажут что да как".
"I'll handle the other settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."
languages.original_text: "Я займусь остальными поселениями, а вы направляйтесь в Клеть, Ваша Светлость. Там Янур и губернатор, они скажут что да как".

traits.locale_text: "I'll handle the rest of the settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."
"I'll handle the rest of the settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."
"I'll handle the other settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."
"I'll handle the other settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."
"I'll handle the other settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."

languages.text: "Ich kümmere mich um die anderen Siedlungen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Geht Ihr zum Käfig. Janur und {nc|die Gouverneurin|der Gouverneur} sind bereits dort. Sie werden Euch sagen, wie die Dinge stehen."
languages.original_text: "I'll handle the other settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."

traits.locale_text: "Ich kümmere mich um die anderen Siedlungen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Geht Ihr zum Käfig. Janur und {nc|die Gouverneurin|der Gouverneur} sind bereits dort. Sie werden Euch sagen, wie die Dinge stehen."

languages.text: « Je me charge des autres colonies, Votre Seigneurie. Vous devriez vous rendre à la Cage. Janur et le gouverneur sont déjà sur place, ils vous expliqueront la situation. »
languages.original_text: "I'll handle the other settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."

traits.locale_text: « Je me charge des autres colonies, Votre Seigneurie. Vous devriez vous rendre à la Cage. Janur et le gouverneur sont déjà sur place, ils vous expliqueront la situation. »

languages.text: “大人，其他定居点我来处理。您最好直奔牢笼。雅努尔和总督都在那儿，他们会告诉您具体情况。”
languages.original_text: "I'll handle the other settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."

traits.locale_text: “大人，其他定居点我来处理。您最好直奔牢笼。雅努尔和总督都在那儿，他们会告诉您具体情况。”

languages.text: «Me encargaré de los otros asentamientos, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Lo mejor es que usted vaya a la Jaula. Janur y {nc|la gobernadora|el gobernador} están allí; le explicarán la situación».
languages.original_text: "I'll handle the other settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."

traits.locale_text: «Me encargaré de los otros asentamientos, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Lo mejor es que usted vaya a la Jaula. Janur y {nc|la gobernadora|el gobernador} están allí; le explicarán la situación».

languages.text: "私は残りの入植地を担当するから、あなたはクレスに向かいなさい、陛下。ジャヌールと総督がそこにいる、何が何だか教えてくれるだろう"
languages.original_text: "I'll take care of the rest of the settlements, you head to Cleth, Your Grace. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you what's what."

languages.text: "Diğer yerleşimlerle ben ilgileneceğim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Sizin Kafes'e gitmeniz en iyisi. Janur ve vali oradalar, size durumu anlatırlar."
languages.original_text: "I'll handle the other settlements, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Best you head to the Cage. Janur and the governor are there, they'll tell you how things stand."

traits.locale_text: "Diğer yerleşimlerle ben ilgileneceğim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Sizin Kafes'e gitmeniz en iyisi. Janur ve vali oradalar, size durumu anlatırlar."
